series_metadata.series_description: The records contain information pertaining to audits conducted by outside auditing entities (CMS, HHS-OIG, OBM, AOS, etc.) as part of the agency's audit coordination and remediation efforts. Records may include systems infrastructure, PHI/PII/CPI, process narratives, and other responses to audit requests from any auditing entity. At the closure of an audit, the auditing entity sends ODM a report with remediation recommendations. ODM develops and completes a corrective action plan and documents the actions taken.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office and 6 years in storage, (10 years total) ; Electronic: on agency drive 10 years
